description: Product Description Previous page Next page Can I reuse them even though it says "disposable"? Yes! Made with 0.035mm triple-layer PE (50% denser than standard ponchos). 73% of users reuse them 3+ times. Simply air-dry the raincoat in the shade after use, then fold it for storage. How many kid ponchos and adult ponchos are included in the Family 6-Pack? How portable are they? The Family 6 Pack includes 3 adult ponchos and 3 kid ponchos. They are palm-sized. The waterproof pouch can be easily put in bags, pockets, or clipped to gear. Do they fit larger users? SWOGAA ponchos feature a universal adult fit for most body types, with full head-to-knee coverage for comfortable movement. How waterproof is it? SWOGAA ponchos are 100% waterproof. The reinforced hood and protective design ensure dryness in heavy rain while shielding you from challenging weather conditions. Why does the adult rain poncho have a hood string while the children's rain poncho doesn't? According to the safety design standards for children's products, the hood string has potential risks such as entanglement and strangulation. Therefore, for safety reasons, our children's rain poncho does not have a hood string.
